clusters.justification: These terms share robust spatial co-activation across the anterior insula, cingulate, and subcortical pathways corresponding to the macro-functional domain of processing emotional valence and arousal.

This cluster maps closely onto mesolimbic and ventromedial prefrontal architectures, representing the overarching functional axis of computing subjective utility, reward processing, and goal-directed motivation.

Anchored functionally in the default mode network's architecture, these terms define the macro-domain of internally directed, abstract representations regarding self-identity, interpersonal dynamics, and social narrative.
